title: BuilderWands
description: BuilderWands is a fork of staff-of-building mod which comes with more wands and features.
body:
# Flat World - [![CircleCI](https://dl.circleci.com/status-badge/img/gh/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands/tree/1%2E19%2E3.svg?style=svg)](https://dl.circleci.com/status-badge/redirect/gh/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands/tree/1%2E19%2E3) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands)](https://github.com/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands/blob/main/LICENSE) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/cQ0r3u5T)](https://modrinth.com/mod/builderwands) [![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/cQ0r3u5T)](https://modrinth.com/mod/builderwands) [![PRs Welcome](https://img.shields.io/badge/PRs-welcome-brightgreen.svg)](https://github.com/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands/pulls)

BuilderWands is a fork of [staff-of-building](https://github.com/Draylar/staff-of-building) mod which comes with more wands and features.

- **More wands:** Comes with a variety of wands made from a variety of materials.
- **Support the latest version:** Support Minecraft 1.19.3.

# Installation

## Prerequisites

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Basic installation

1. Download the latest JAR file from [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/builderwands)
2. Put it in your `mods` folder.
3. Enjoy!

## Build from source

1. Clone the repo: `git clone https://github.com/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands.git`
2. Build a JAR file: `./gradlew build`
3. The generated JAR file will be in `build/libs/`
4. Enjoy!

# Feedback

- [Report an issue](https://github.com/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands/issues)
- [Request a new feature](https://github.com/GoldPiggyMC/BuilderWands/pulls)
